CL-06.title: 404 Error Page
CL-06.description: The website lacks a custom 404 error page, leading to poor user experience when encountering broken links.
CL-06.remediation: Create a custom 404 error page with helpful information and navigation options to guide users back to the main site.

CL-07.title: Form Validation
CL-07.description: Form fields on the website do not have real-time validation feedback, causing user confusion.
CL-07.remediation: Implement client-side form validation to provide instant feedback on input errors.

CL-10.title: Breadcrumb Navigation
CL-10.description: The website lacks breadcrumb navigation, making it difficult for users to track their navigation path.
CL-10.remediation: Implement breadcrumb navigation to help users understand their current location within the website.

CL-19.title: Search Functionality
CL-19.description: The website features a search functionality for users to easily find content.

CL-15.title: Streamline User Registration Process
CL-15.description: Simplify the user registration process to reduce friction and increase conversions.
CL-15.remediation: Optimize the registration form by minimizing required fields and steps.

CL-16.title: Effective Error Handling
CL-16.description: Implement effective error handling to provide clear feedback to users.

CL-17.title: Personalized User Experience
CL-17.description: Personalize the user experience based on user preferences and behavior.
CL-17.remediation: Implement user profiling and customization features.

CL-18.title: Efficient Checkout Process
CL-18.description: Optimize the checkout process for a seamless and efficient user experience.
CL-18.remediation: Streamline the checkout steps and provide multiple payment options.

CL-07.title: Intuitive Navigation
CL-07.description: Improve website navigation to enhance user experience
CL-07.remediation: Simplify website structure and improve menu navigation for better usability

CL-08.title: Form Field Validation
CL-08.description: Validate user inputs in forms to prevent errors
CL-08.remediation: Continue to check and enhance form field validation to improve user experience

CL-11.title: Intuitive Navigation
CL-11.description: Ensure intuitive website navigation for users.

CL-13.title: Form Validation
CL-13.description: Implement client-side form validation for better user experience.
CL-13.remediation: Add client-side form validation to improve user experience.

CL-14.title: Error Handling
CL-14.description: Provide clear error messages and guidance to users.

CL-12.title: Intuitive Navigation
CL-12.description: Provide intuitive navigation to help users easily find information.
